audit_items.proof_trace: The execution layer path (engine_getBlobsV2 → from_execution_verified) skips KZG verification entirely, while gossip path performs verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch. Cached unverified columns then bypass gossip verification (L486-500), violating equivalence.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Malicious EL provides invalid KZG proofs via engine_getBlobsV2. Consensus layer accepts and caches them without verification (from_execution_verified), then propagates them on gossip, bypassing KZG checks for cached columns. Network accepts invalid data availability proofs.
